content_blocks.body_md:
Capsaicin doesn't actually burn tissue; it hijacks the same receptor that
senses real heat, which is why your brain insists your mouth is on fire.

why_it_matters.text: The molecule that makes chili peppers hot; it trips the same nerves that sense heat, so your mouth reads a burn that is not really there.
